REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.

BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
